scripts.dev: npm run build -w @mineserver/shared && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @mineserver/api" "npm run dev -w @mineserver/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @mineserver/shared && npm run build -w @mineserver/api && npm run build -w @mineserver/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @mineserver/shared && npm run typecheck -w @mineserver/api && npm run typecheck -w @mineserver/web
scripts.test: npm run build -w @mineserver/shared && npm run test -w @mineserver/shared && npm run test -w @mineserver/api && npm run test -w @mineserver/web
